name: mb-smart-product-wiki
description: Ministry Brands Smart Product Wiki. Three skills for product teams: the Knowledgebase Maker (builds a complete product knowledgebase from a guided interview), the Knowledgebase Assistant (your day-to-day companion for querying, updating, auditing, and prepping your knowledgebase before any task), and the Persona Maker (creates data-informed user personas with gap analysis and a concrete validation plan).
